bouquets.title: Peach Meadow
bouquets.desc: A soft and radiant arrangement of peach and blush roses with lush greenery in a straw basket — light and natural.

bouquets.title: Blush Romance
bouquets.desc: A premium bouquet of deep pink and ivory roses, complemented by silver eucalyptus — sophisticated and intimate.

bouquets.title: Pastel Garden
bouquets.desc: A pastel-toned mix of spray roses and greenery in a woven basket — gentle, airy, and perfect for any occasion.

bouquets.title: Tulip Charm
bouquets.desc: A vivid bouquet of bright tulips and roses in a lavender box — cheerful and full of charm.

bouquets.title: Berry Bloom
bouquets.desc: A lush mix of rich pink, purple, and cream blooms with textured greens — romantic and elegant.

bouquets.title: Sweet Whisper
bouquets.desc: A charming spring bouquet with peonies, roses, and lilac-toned accents — fresh, lively, and expressive.

bouquets.title: Field Joy
bouquets.desc: A rustic hand-tied bouquet of sunflowers, lisianthus, and daisies — perfect for brightening the day.

bouquets.title: Soft Bloom
bouquets.desc: A delicate bouquet of pink carnations and roses wrapped in satin paper — soft, stylish, and versatile.

bouquets.title: Golden Hour
bouquets.desc: A warm composition of golden tulips and roses that captures the glow of a summer evening.

bouquets.title: Rose Whisper
bouquets.desc: A stylish composition of roses, seasonal greenery, and vibrant berries — a bold and elegant floral statement.

bouquets.title: Lilac Charm
bouquets.desc: A rich bouquet with lavender, lisianthus, and roses — ideal for those who love deep hues and gentle fragrance.

bouquets.title: Wild Meadow
bouquets.desc: A relaxed, garden-style gathering of wildflowers and roses — effortless and full of texture.

bouquets.title: Velvet Bloom
bouquets.desc: Deep, velvety blooms arranged with silver greenery for a refined, evening-ready gift.

bouquets.title: Sunny Days
bouquets.desc: A bright, cheerful basket bouquet bursting with warm-toned blooms — perfect for celebrations.
